title: "Questions to ask your care team" sets (per late effect + transition)
context: Education-only prompt lists for ewing-survivorship-late-effects that help survivors raise late-effect and transition topics with their care team. HIGH risk-tier patient-facing: explicitly NOT a self-assessment or triage tool, advocate-reviewed for tone, with the 'Informational, not medical advice - consult your care team' label. Publish requires that no patient-facing page ships without BOTH a credentialed pediatric/AYA oncologist AND a patient-advocate version-scoped sign-off (neither alone suffices).
objective: Draft 'Questions to ask your care team' sets tied to each late effect and the transition module, education-only and advocate-reviewed.
acceptanceCriteria: Education-only prompt lists tied to each late effect + the transition; NOT a self-assessment or triage checklist
Advocate-reviewed for tone; sourced where they encode a recommendation; no-advice label present
Passes all automated gates and carries both oncologist + advocate version-scoped sign-offs
